title: Add guidedOnboarding sidebar nav item and all i18n translation keys in all 4 locale files
acceptance_criteria: In sidebar-nav-service.ts: { navKey: 'guidedOnboarding', icon: 'pi pi-qrcode', route: '/reception/onboarding/home' } added to the reception-desk array
In public/assets/i18n/en.json: key layout.nav.guidedOnboarding added with value 'Guided Onboarding'

In public/assets/i18n/en.json: reception.onboarding section added with keys: scanQrCode, scanYourFace, somethingWentWrong, printingLabel, labelPrinted, done, startOver, start, debugQrValue, debugBadgeId, debugError
In public/assets/i18n/nl.json: same keys added with Dutch translations
In public/assets/i18n/fr.json: same keys added with French translations
In public/assets/i18n/ar.json: same keys added with Arabic translations
All 4 locale files remain valid JSON after edits
No other keys in any locale file are modified
completion_summary: Added guidedOnboarding sidebar nav item and all reception.onboarding i18n keys across all 4 locale files (en/nl/fr/ar)
